task_completion.description: Apply the JaCoCo plugin and set the tool version
task_completion.visual_evidence: In app/build.gradle.kts, look for the 'jacoco' plugin being applied (e.g., id("jacoco") in the plugins block) and a jacoco configuration block setting toolVersion = "0.8.12".

task_completion.description: Register the jacocoTestReport task with correct dependency
task_completion.visual_evidence: In app/build.gradle.kts, look for the registration of a task named 'jacocoTestReport' of type JacocoReport (e.g., tasks.register<JacocoReport>("jacocoTestReport")). It must explicitly include dependsOn("testDebugUnitTest").

task_completion.description: Configure source directories and execution data paths
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the jacocoTestReport task, look for sourceDirectories.setFrom(...) including both 'src/main/java' and 'src/main/kotlin'. Also look for executionData.setFrom(...) pointing to 'app/build/jacoco/testDebugUnitTest.exec' (or using layout.buildDirectory).

task_completion.description: Configure class directories with all 7 required exclusions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the jacocoTestReport task, look for classDirectories.setFrom(...) pointing to the debug compiled output ('app/build/tmp/kotlin-classes/debug'). It MUST include an exclude list with exactly these 7 patterns: **/R.class, **/R$*.class, **/BuildConfig.*, **/Manifest*.*, **/*Test*.*, **/databinding/**, **/android/**.
Inside the jacocoTestReport task, look for a reports block that enables HTML (e.g., reports { html.required.set(true) } or html.isEnabled = true).

task_completion.description: Execute the Gradle task to generate the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window showing the successful execution of './gradlew jacocoTestReport' (e.g., 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL') OR a file explorer/browser displaying the generated 'index.html' at 'app/build/reports/jacoco/jacocoTestReport/html/index.html'.

integrity.description: Ensure WeatherUtils.kt and WeatherUtilsTest.kt were not modified
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the editor tabs or terminal history to ensure the agent did not open and modify WeatherUtils.kt or WeatherUtilsTest.kt. There should be no git diff or unsaved changes for these files.

The terminal output for the Gradle command should show standard Gradle build logs (e.g., progress indicators, task execution list, 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL in ...'), rather than just a manually echoed string.

integrity.description: Verify the build file was edited in a real editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The app/build.gradle.kts file should be seen open in a genuine text editor or IDE (like Android Studio, VS Code, vim, or nano) with standard syntax highlighting, rather than just being overwritten by a basic echo command without visual verification.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp. The target file is app/build.gradle.kts. The agent must configure JaCoCo 0.8.12 and register a task named 'jacocoTestReport'. CRITICAL: The task description explicitly requires 7 exclusion patterns (**/R.class, **/R$*.class, **/BuildConfig.*, **/Manifest*.*, **/*Test*.*, **/databinding/**, **/android/**) - ensure all 7 are present in the build.gradle.kts file. The final HTML report should be generated at app/build/reports/jacoco/jacocoTestReport/html/index.html.
